title: Laguna Beach, July 2023
description: A dusk sequence through Laguna Beach: storefronts, transit, murals, corridors, and the Pacific at sunset.

cover.alt: Golden sunset over the Pacific seen past utility lines and the edge of a coastal street in Laguna Beach.

items.alt: Motorcycles and a red Camaro paused at a Laguna Beach intersection in late-afternoon light.
A Laguna Beach transit trolley passing storefronts under warm evening light.
Sunlit facade and signage for The Saloon and Pepper Tree in Laguna Beach.
An ocean-themed mural on a building wall with the Pacific visible behind parked cars.
A narrow corridor framing a view of the ocean between stucco walls and plants.
